calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Req. And Req. For Prove-Up Hearing And Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Jeffrey Faucette, Esq. appeared for and with the plaintiff Wendy Re, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendantLevon Saakov.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages $28,300.00
Prejudgment Interest $6,460.81
Attorney's fees $21,549.01
Costs $3,562.41.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $59,872.23
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
